# Code

Marks inline code or a short command within running text.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/code
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview slug="code" example={0} code={`<Code>npm install</Code>`} />

```tsx
<Code>npm install</Code>
```

<ComponentPreview slug="code" example={1} code={`<Code variant="outline">pnpm build</Code>`} />

```tsx
<Code variant="outline">pnpm build</Code>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="code"
  example={2}
  code={`<Text>Run <Code>pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add button</Code> to copy a component.</Text>`}
/>

```tsx
<Text>
  Run <Code>pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add button</Code> to copy a component.
</Text>
```

## Props

| Prop      | Type          | Required | Default | Description                             |
| --------- | ------------- | -------- | ------- | --------------------------------------- |
| `variant` | `CodeVariant` | No       | -       | Visual treatment. Defaults to \`soft\`. |

## Variants

| Variant   | Values                     |
| --------- | -------------------------- |
| `variant` | `soft`, `outline`, `ghost` |

## Registry

- Manifest: `/r/code.json`
- Recipe: `code`
- Files: `src/components/ui/code.tsx`
